brief_justification: Correct answer (Yes) with valid Bayesian calculation; goes beyond surface by connecting DAG structure to the probability question and noting the observational vs interventional distinction; the RA²R injection and note about do-calculus show some self-monitoring of reasoning approach; basic verification through computing both conditional probabilities that sum to 1; acknowledges the causal structure caveat and distinguishes observational from interventional reasoning; mentions do-calculus as an alternative approach and explains why it's not needed here; full derivation chain from given probabilities through Bayes' theorem to conclusion is reproducible
